title: ace's endless night
description: Save the world from what the scientist has unleashed! Horror modpack.
body:
[![BoxToPlay sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8b7363c6efe6ca2a42eac08732aedec25d355ab.png)](https://www.boxtoplay.com/en/minecraft-hosting/minecraft-server) Check out BoxToPlay for cheap and powerful minecraft servers (seriously, it's the one I use daily, it's great) A scientist has opened a breach between hell and the living world, find the way to cross it and kill the god on the other side! Nights are very long and days very short. I designed this modpack with the idea of making something actually scary by expanding from what is already scary in minecraft. More tension, no impossible difficulty (by default the game difficulty will set itself to hard, you can't set it to something else but you can change it later if it's too much), no jumpscares every 3 seconds and no full modrinth library of every single dweller mod available (there are dweller style bosses but ngl you might not even fight them once)\ Also you can play it in VR but it's not necessary, if you do turn off motionblur in `video settings > shaderpacks > astralex > post process > motionblur` or you will throw up. ## features: **-custom tuned shader (astralex)\ -a new dimension\ -a lot of scary stuff\ -lore but I didn't go super crazy with it** \ \ important craft because it doesn't show up in the recipe book: ![(it's the sword's blade)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfde5deb992d3c3f5a95fdf43c0b1e10f889ca20.png)
list of non modrinth projects

Stalker Creepers
Eyes In The Darkness

Hope you enjoy and please give me feedback!
